subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Water-to-air unitary air-conditioners with a rated capacity greater than or equal to 65 kW, including packaged air-conditioners, split systems, and variable refrigerant flow units, must have a minimum energy efficiency ratio of 4.0 Wr/Winput power for cooling when tested in accordance with AS/NZS ISO 13256.1 at test condition C3, where input power includes both compressor and fan input power.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Assessed individually or collectively, a building’s air-cooled unitary air-conditioning equipment, including packaged air-conditioners, split systems, and variable refrigerant flow units, must have a weighted efficiency index greater than 1—

ol.li:
calculated using the following formula, based on the energy efficiency ratio, WEIEER=∑Allapplicableunitaryconditioners,iEERiDi∑Allapplicableunitaryairconditioners,iEERiminDiMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= WEIEERMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaam4vaiaadw eacaWGjbWaaSbaaSqaaiaadweacaWGfbGaamOuaaqabaaaaa@3B02@ R0lGODlhMgAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAMgAYAAACcISPqcvtD6OctNqLsw4c8O9133iAmocEabmy J2p0cTu7p4rieA3b96yj7Xi/4DBk8mWMPd7xuISpnkooRhZSUImjKSmZ2mGJPWhQCtTSYl0ZiSVG N1+LpAlMV8fF1rzrPEXmx+YGYtg3mKi4yNgIUQAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHuBQEABwdEU01UNwAB E1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmll ciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQ D0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEB AAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINXAAIAg0UAAgCDSQADABsAAAsBAAIAg0UAAgCDRQACAINSAAABAQAAAAAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM/88P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5zbGF0 b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClAIC0t PjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bXJvdz48 bWk+VzwvbWk+PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtc3ViPjxtaT5JPC9taT48bXJvdz48bWk+RTwvbWk+PG1pPkU8 L21pPjxtaT5SPC9taT48L21yb3c+PC9tc3ViPjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGgbPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVA RW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBggAAAAAAAA7 = the weighted efficiency index of the unitary air-conditioners serving a building, assessed based on their rated Energy Efficiency Ratios; and
for each air-conditioner, iMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyAaaaa@36E5@ R0lGODlhCQARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAACQARAAACEoSPqXvBv4JkTlVLI7iNww8iBQAh/wtNYXRo VHlwZTAwMckFAQAHB0RTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9t YW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIf HkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F 9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAg2kAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDPBPD94 bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChD bGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0 cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1pPmk8L21pPjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1h dGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYEAAAAAAAAOw==—
EERiMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyraiaadw eacaWGsbWaaSbaaSqaaiaadMgaaeqaaaaa@397C@ R0lGODlhJQAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAJQAYAAACVYSPqcvtD6OctNoLgt7h8G18UuchZFii0JmZ rto+JxvXNr3MiZ7ajWjiBDURXo9FwjGMMGTPQWPGjEqfNLmDfoiZbUcYAmEm1XHOXEQXy+q2+w2P FAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHkBQEABwdEU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGlt ZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9B UPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQ D0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINFAAIAg0UAAgCDUgAD ABsAAAsBAAIAg2kAAAEBAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz+Tw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/Pjwh LS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1M IDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgv TWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93PjxtaT5FPC9taT48bWk+RTwvbWk+PG1zdWI+PG1pPlI8L21pPjxt aT5pPC9taT48L21zdWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYIAAAAAAAAOw== = the tested energy efficiency ratio, determined in accordance with MEPS; and
DiMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiramaaBa aaleaacaWGPbaabeaaaaa@37DA@ R0lGODlhFAAYAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFAAYAAACLISPqcvtD6MEodoZUI779PYZ4TKOSvmYpnZC KMWEVWpd3ppOrA7zFO4LCn0FACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx2gUBAAcHRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNp Y0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQg RXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9Cpf SPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEA AgCDRAADABsAAAsBAAIAg2kAAAEBAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz5Tw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEu MCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxA TWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3Jn LzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93Pjxtc3ViPjxtaT5EPC9taT48bWk+aTwvbWk+PC9tc3Vi PjwvbXJvdz48L21hdGg+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBFbmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIG CAAAAAAAADs= = the rated cooling capacity determined in accordance with MEPS; and
EE R i min MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyraiaadw eacaWGsbWaa0baaSqaaiaadMgaaeaaciGGTbGaaiyAaiaac6gaaaaa aa@3C50@ R0lGODlhMgAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAMgAZAAACa4SPqcvtD6OctNoLAt68owCCR5g94TmeYoYa 2pvCjjZ+tluXMovPdw+klXRDXnEhFAZ/OtWLtELmpsqkx9WKRVlbjvVXBXq+VPD1WFQOyWqKmtx7 d5wr+jOaPWPaend//7fHF0hYaHiIOFEAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAx9AUBAAcIRFNNVDcAARNXaW5B bGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3 ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA 9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEA BAAACgEAAgCDRQACAINFAAIAg1IAAwAdAAALAQACAINpAAABAAICgm0AAgCCaQACAIJuAAAAAAAA If8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xh dG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAt LT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+ PG1pPkU8L21pPjxtaT5FPC9taT48bXN1YnN1cD48bWk+UjwvbWk+PG1pPmk8L21pPjxtcm93Pjxt aT5taW48L21pPjwvbXJvdz48L21zdWJzdXA+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48GSEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBF bmRANUA1QCAtLT4AIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDIGCAAAAAAAADs= = the applicable nominal minimum energy efficiency ratio in Table J6D12a; or

calculated using the following formula, based on the Total Cooling Seasonal Performance Factor, WEITCSPF=∑Allapplicableunitaryairconditioners,jTCSPFjDj∑Allapplicableunitaryairconditioners,jTCSPFjminDjMathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahCart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn D j MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamiramaaBa aaleaacaWGQbaabeaaaaa@37DC@ R0lGODlhFQAZAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAFQAZAAACMYSPqcvtD6NUodoJAtKSH++AhsiQ5GJC55mk KrWhLbtZV43F+bhnvZ/T0BqVn/GoKAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDHaBQEABwhEU01UNwABE1dpbkFs bEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGltZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcA EQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9BUPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0 j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQD0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAE AAAKAQACAINEAAMAGwAACwEAAgCDagAAAQEAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDPlPD94bWwgdmVyc2lv bj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQp LnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53 My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1zdWI+PG1pPkQ8L21pPjxtaT5qPC9taT48 L21zdWI+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlw ZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the rated cooling capacity determined in accordance with MEPS; and
TCSP F j min MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamivaiaado eacaWGtbGaamiuaiaadAeadaqhaaWcbaGaamOAaaqaaiGac2gacaGG PbGaaiOBaaaaaaa@3DFF@ R0lGODlhRAAaAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAARAAaAAACjoSPqcvtD6OctNqLs3Zh+w+GQECSRzky5Woa aOq23cgirJzOdKfb59/auU7BntGXg9GGiWOy+Ysyp0oYT4lr9KpTJ1cHJtZWSxWSs/BiQ2qtomYj f7Zbt/R939DR0nqfDRVYFWZWaOHn9WJlJyIXF2QloyhWBylyiYepKbip6dcJCIp5JXppWYqaqroq UgAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDH+BQEABwhEU01UNwABE1dpbkFsbEJhc2ljQ29kZVBhZ2VzABEFVGlt ZXMgTmV3IFJvbWFuABEDU3ltYm9sABEFQ291cmllciBOZXcAEQRNVCBFeHRyYQASAAghL0WPRC9B UPQQD0dfQVDyHx5BUPQVD0EA9EX0JfSPQl9BAPQQD0NfQQD0j0X0Kl9I9I9BAPQQD0D0j0F/SPQQ D0EqX0RfRfRfRfRfQQ8MAQABAAECAgICAAIAAQEBAAMAAQAEAAAKAQACAINUAAIAg0MAAgCDUwAC AINQAAIAg0YAAwAdAAALAQACAINqAAABAAICgm0AAgCCaQACAIJuAAAAAAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUw MDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFuc2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRo TUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpQCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxu cz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1yb3c+PG1pPlQ8L21pPjxt aT5DPC9taT48bWk+UzwvbWk+PG1pPlA8L21pPjxtc3Vic3VwPjxtaT5GPC9taT48bWk+ajwvbWk+ PG1yb3c+PG1pPm1pbjwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbXN1LWJzdXA+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48IS0tIE1h dGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYJAAAAAAAAOw== = the applicable nominal minimum energy efficiency ratio in Table J6D12b.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Where the weighted efficiency index contribution of an air-conditioner is assessed using the formula at (2)(a), air-cooled unitary air-conditioners, including packaged air-conditioners, split systems and variable refrigerant flow units, must have—

ol.li:
at least one—
digital scroll compressor; or
inverter driven compressor.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The compressor required by 3(b) must be sized sufficiently to allow the unit to modulate across 50% to 100% of its rated cooling capacity.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The requirements of (2) to (4) do not apply to—

ol.li: unitary air-conditioners with a rated cooling capacity of less than 10 kW; or
unitary air-conditioners that serve only a Class 4 part of a building.

subclause.title: NSW REPLACE SubClause
subclause.p: The requirements of (2) to (4) do not apply to unitary air-conditioners with a rated cooling capacity of less than 10kW.

callout.p: Variable refrigerant flow and multi-split units are tested as representative combination.
